description: Create the complete Python FastAPI backend with WebSocket chat, Google Gemini-powered AI agents (orchestrator, planner, scheduler, notification, voice), MCP client, and OAuth middleware. Also create both MCP servers (google-calendar, google-tasks) as standalone Python packages, shared types, docker-compose.yml, and root config files.
steps: Create backend/requirements.txt with: fastapi, uvicorn[standard], websockets, google-genai, google-auth, google-api-python-client, mcp, pydantic, python-dotenv, httpx
Create backend/app/__init__.py (empty)

Create backend/app/main.py - FastAPI app with: WebSocket endpoint at /ws for chat (receives JSON with type/content/auth_token, dispatches to orchestrator agent, streams responses back), REST endpoints (GET /api/tasks, GET /api/calendar/events), CORS middleware for frontend origin, startup/shutdown events
Create backend/app/auth.py - Google OAuth token validation: verify ID token using google-auth library, extract user info, dependency injection for FastAPI routes
Create backend/app/agents/__init__.py (empty)

Create backend/app/agents/base.py - AgentBase abstract class: async execute(task: dict) -> dict, agent registry (register/deregister), standard interface, MCP tool binding method, agent metadata (name, description, capabilities)

Create backend/app/agents/orchestrator.py - OrchestratorAgent: uses google-genai SDK with Gemini 2.5 Flash model, analyzes user message intent via LLM, routes to specialist agents (planner/scheduler/notification/voice), consolidates responses, maintains conversation context

Create backend/app/agents/planner.py - PlannerAgent: uses Gemini to break user goals into subtasks with deadlines, calls Google Tasks MCP server tools (create_task, list_tasks), returns structured plan

Create backend/app/agents/scheduler.py - SchedulerAgent: uses Gemini to find optimal time slots, calls Google Calendar MCP server tools (list_events, find_free_slots, create_event), considers existing events
Create backend/app/agents/notification.py - NotificationAgent: generates context-aware reminders, escalating urgency based on deadline proximity, proactive suggestions using Gemini
Create backend/app/agents/voice.py - VoiceAgent: uses Google Cloud TTS (via google-cloud-texttospeech or REST API) for speech synthesis, returns base64 encoded audio buffer
Create backend/app/mcp/__init__.py (empty)
Create backend/app/mcp/client.py - MCPClient class: connects to MCP servers via stdio transport, discovers available tools, executes tool calls, manages server lifecycle (start/stop processes)
Create backend/app/config.py - Configuration using pydantic BaseSettings: loads from .env, defines GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, GEMINI_API_KEY, GCP_PROJECT_ID
Create backend/.env.example with GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, GEMINI_API_KEY, GCP_PROJECT_ID
Create backend/Dockerfile - Python 3.11 slim image, install requirements, copy app, expose 8000, run uvicorn
Create mcp-servers/google-calendar/pyproject.toml - package config with mcp dependency

Create mcp-servers/google-calendar/server.py - MCP server implementing tools: list_events (list calendar events in date range), create_event (create new calendar event), find_free_slots (find available time slots), delete_event (delete by event ID). Uses google-api-python-client for Calendar API
Create mcp-servers/google-calendar/requirements.txt with mcp, google-auth, google-api-python-client
Create mcp-servers/google-tasks/pyproject.toml - package config with mcp dependency

Create mcp-servers/google-tasks/server.py - MCP server implementing tools: list_tasks (list all tasks), create_task (create with title/notes/due), update_task (update fields), complete_task (mark complete), delete_task (delete by ID). Uses google-api-python-client for Tasks API
Create mcp-servers/google-tasks/requirements.txt with mcp, google-auth, google-api-python-client
Create shared/schemas.py - shared Pydantic models: ChatMessage, AgentResponse, TaskItem, CalendarEvent, WebSocketMessage
Create shared/__init__.py (empty)
Create docker-compose.yml at project root: frontend service (port 3000, build ./frontend), backend service (port 8000, build ./backend, env_file), volumes for development
Create root .gitignore (node_modules, __pycache__, .env, .next, venv, *.pyc, dist)
Create root README.md with project overview, setup instructions, architecture description
acceptance_criteria: Backend Python files have no syntax errors (python -m py_compile passes for all .py files)
FastAPI app defines WebSocket endpoint at /ws with proper JSON message handling
OrchestratorAgent uses google-genai SDK (not vertexai) with Gemini 2.5 Flash model
All agents inherit from AgentBase and implement async execute method
MCP client can manage server lifecycle and discover/execute tools
MCP servers define proper tool schemas using the mcp library
Google Calendar MCP server implements list_events, create_event, find_free_slots, delete_event
Google Tasks MCP server implements list_tasks, create_task, update_task, complete_task, delete_task
docker-compose.yml is valid YAML with frontend and backend services
All .env.example files contain the correct environment variable names
WebSocket protocol matches: send {type, content, auth_token}, receive {type, content, agent}
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m py_compile app/main.py && python -m py_compile app/agents/orchestrator.py && python -m py_compile app/agents/base.py && python -m py_compile app/mcp/client.py
cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI && python -c 'import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open("docker-compose.yml"))' || docker compose config --quiet
findings: Python 3.11 required (mcp package needs >=3.10). Used pyenv global 3.11.15 to switch. google-genai 2.10.0 installed (latest compatible), mcp 1.28.0 installed. FastAPI 0.138.0 installed. All Python files pass py_compile and imports work correctly. docker-compose.yml validates as proper YAML.
